command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FbaZk1xReQNtZ9.686a19e568c0 --database ZMnvJNTTjnmfJ7Sacrr6SU --execute 
DELETE v1 FROM votes v1
INNER JOIN votes v2
WHERE v1.gameEventId = v2.gameEventId
  AND v1.playerId = v2.playerId
  AND v1.id < v2.id;

ALTER TABLE votes ADD UNIQUE INDEX unique_vote (gameEventId, playerId);
